productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Casual Black Duffle Bag
description: Perfect for that weekend trip, this rugged duffel bag from nike is a great bag that can carry all your essentials when you head into the wilderness. MeasurementHeight: 65 cmWidth: 30 cmDepth: 30 cmCapacity: 58 litresMade of 100% polyester on the outside with 100% nylon lining on the inside for enhanced durability and styleNylon bonded thread for durabilityBranded zippers and slidersOne zippered chamber for easy storageTwo side zippered mesh compartments for enhanced spaceRemovable and adjustable long strap to convert it into a hand bag when not travellingShort padded strap with velcro fastening for added comfort and carrying easeLong straps attached to the side loops with claspsBranding on the side and frontBar tacked for increased durabilityWash careDo not machine washRub surface with damp clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not bleach, line dry, iron or dry clean
